content.problemStatement: Somu went to the gym today. He decided to do $X$ sets of squats. Each set consists of $15$ squats. Determine the total number of squats that he did today.
content.inputFormat: - The first line contains an integer $X$ — the total number of sets of squats that Somu did.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output the total number of squats done by Somu.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Since, he does only $1$ set of squats, the total number of squats done by him is $15$.
Since, he does $4$ sets of squats, the total number of squats is $15 + 15 + 15 + 15 = 60$.
